prompt_text: Stonly vs Confluence pricing and features
response:
# Stonly vs Confluence: Pricing & Features Comparison

## **Pricing Overview**

| Feature | Stonly | Confluence |
|---------|--------|-----------|
| **Free Plan** | Limited | Yes (up to 10 users) |
| **Starting Price** | ~$99/month | ~$7/user/month |
| **Per-User Model** | No (flat-rate) | Yes |
| **Best For** | Small-medium teams | Growing organizations |

---

## **Key Features Comparison**

### **Stonly**
✅ **Strengths:**
- Interactive guides & walkthroughs
- In-app help & tooltips
- Multi-language support built-in
- Real-time analytics & user behavior tracking
- Self-service support focus
- Video embedding
- Mobile-optimized

❌ **Weaknesses:**
- Less suitable for complex documentation
- Smaller ecosystem
- Limited collaboration features vs. Confluence

### **Confluence**
✅ **Strengths:**
- Excellent for collaborative documentation
- Deep Jira integration (if using Atlassian products)
- Powerful search & organization
- Extensive plugin marketplace (1000+ add-ons)
- Better for large knowledge bases
- Version control & page history

❌ **Weaknesses:**
- Steeper learning curve
- Can become expensive at scale
- Less focused on in-app guidance
- Requires more setup/maintenance

---

## **Use Case Match**

| Choose **Stonly** if you need... | Choose **Confluence** if you need... |
|----------------------------------|-------------------------------------|
| In-app help & support guidance | Internal wiki & knowledge base |
| Self-service customer support | Team documentation & collaboration |
| Multi-language support | Complex organizational docs |
| Analytics on user behavior | Jira/Atlassian ecosystem integration |
| Quick implementation | Scalable enterprise solution |

---

## **Bottom Line**

- **Stonly** = Customer support & onboarding tool
- **Confluence** = Team documentation & knowledge management

They solve different problems—consider using both together.
